COMMON.PURCHASE_ERROR: Could not complete the purchase. Please try again.
COMMON.REMOVE_ADS_DESCRIPTION: Remove ads forever and enable lossless/compressed export selection.
COMMON.RESTORE_ERROR: Could not restore purchases. Please try again.
COMMON.SHARE_KINDLE_HINT: When sharing, select the Kindle app to send it to your device.
COMMON.EDIT_PROJECT_TITLE: How do you want to edit this file?
COMMON.EDIT_PROJECT_MESSAGE: Choose whether to replace the current file or keep it as a copy.
COMMON.EDIT_PROJECT_OVERWRITE_DESC: Save changes on top of the existing file.
COMMON.EDIT_PROJECT_COPY_DESC: Keep the original file and edit a new copy.

CHANGE.ADS_REQUIRED: The ad could not be loaded. Check your network or ad blocker.
CHANGE.COVER_CHANGED: Cover changed. You can now save or share
CHANGE.HINT_SAVE_SHARE_EXPLAIN: Changing the cover does not save it automatically.
CHANGE.INFO_STEP_1_2: 1.2. Change the image or keep the original.
CHANGE.INFO_STEP_2: Adjust the image in the editor.
CHANGE.INFO_STEP_3: Watch the ad to save the cover.
CHANGE.IMAGE_ERROR_CORRUPT: The image could not be read. Please try another one.
CHANGE.IMAGE_ERROR_SIZE: The file is too large. Maximum {{maxSize}} MB.
CHANGE.IMAGE_ERROR_TYPE: Unsupported format ({{type}}). Please select JPG, PNG, or WebP.
CHANGE.IMAGE_WARN_SMALL: The image may be too small for some devices.
CHANGE.IMAGE_WARN_INVALID_EPUB_COVER: Invalid EPUB cover. Tap to choose a new image.
CHANGE.EPUB_ERROR_CORRUPT: The EPUB could not be read. Try another file.
CHANGE.EPUB_ERROR_NO_COVER: This EPUB does not contain a replaceable cover.
CHANGE.NO_COVER_DETECTED_ADDED: No cover detected. A new cover was added to this EPUB.
CHANGE.EPUB_ERROR_REWRITE: The EPUB could not be processed. Please try again.
CHANGE.EPUB_ERROR_STORAGE: Not enough storage space. Need {{requiredMB}} MB, available {{availableMB}} MB.
CHANGE.EPUB_ERROR_SIZE: The file is too large. Maximum {{maxSize}} MB.
CHANGE.SAVE_RENAME_MESSAGE: Enter a name for the cover
CHANGE.TITLE: Change cover

COVERS.EMPTY: No covers found in the app. Files created before reinstalling may not appear due to system restrictions.
COVERS.TITLE: My EPUBs
COVERS.DITHERED_THUMBNAIL_NOTICE: Covers with artifact reduction may look different in thumbnails. Open preview to see a more accurate result.

DELETE.MESSAGE: Do you want to delete this EPUB?
DELETE.TITLE: Delete EPUB

ERROR.DELETE: Could not delete the EPUB. Please try again.
ERROR.SHARE: Could not share the EPUB. Please try again.
ERROR.LOAD: Could not load your EPUBs. Pull down to refresh.
ERROR.PREVIEW: Could not load preview. Try again.
ERROR.OPEN: Could not open the EPUB. Please try again.
ERROR.OPEN_PROJECT: Could not open the project. Please try again.

INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_1: Select an EPUB file (the current cover preloads)
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_2: Adjust the loaded cover or choose a new image and adjust
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_3: Watch the ad to change the cover in the EPUB
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_4: Save or share the updated EPUB
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_4_DESC: Once ready, you can save it to your device or share it directly with the Kindle app for a smoother transition.
INSTRUCTIONS.STEP_5_DESC: You can also send it from your browser using the Send to Kindle web tool.
INSTRUCTIONS.TIP: For best results, use high-resolution images and make sure ads are disabled on your Kindle device.
INSTRUCTIONS.TITLE: Instructions

CONTROLS.INTERACT_HINT: Interact with the highlighted element to continue.

EPUB.TITLE: EPUB file
EPUB.DESCRIPTION: Select the EPUB file you want to update.

IMAGE.TITLE: Cover image
IMAGE.DESCRIPTION: Select the image for your cover.

ADJUST.TITLE: Adjust
ADJUST.DESCRIPTION: Adjust the image in the editor and tap Done.

EXPORT.TITLE: Export quality
EXPORT.DESCRIPTION: Free export uses Standard. Remove ads to unlock export selection (Lossless/Compressed).

REMOVE_ADS_CLOSE.TITLE: Close for now
REMOVE_ADS_CLOSE.DESCRIPTION: For now, enjoy the free version. You are not obligated to buy.

RESULTS.TITLE: Save or share
RESULTS.DESCRIPTION: Save or share your updated EPUB.

SETTINGS.INSTRUCTIONS_HINT: How to change and send a cover for Kindle
SETTINGS.EREADER_OPTIMIZATION_HINT: Apply automatic adjustments to improve the cover
SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
